anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen practice-realization and inherited religious participation.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence unless the rubric includes no-threshold, no-break, inherited-practice, practice-realization, no-custody-frame, analyst-frame-refused, and undecidable values, and still makes held-out predictions.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: Dogen-style practice-realization collapses the ordinary sequence of beginning, method, and fruit. Inherited participation may have no salient first-break event. Both cases strain a model that assumes transformation begins through a narratable threshold and later authorizes a remainder.

claim_units: Traditions authorize or refuse some remainder after critique, such as self, no-self continuity, grace, vow, teacher recognition, practice-realization, ritual, community, or silence.
Traditions narrate or enact entry through grammars such as crisis, vow, grace, teacher encounter, inherited participation, gradual socialization, no-threshold practice, or self-disclosure.
Residue authorization constrains which entry grammars are coherent.
Entry events can disclose what the tradition later names as usable remainder.
Circularity severity is separable: some paths require the transformed capacity in order to begin transformation.
Source layer matters, so canonical doctrine, entry ritual, practitioner report, pedagogy, and later systematization should not be collapsed.
Downstream safeguards, warnings, effort theories, and verification forms should be predicted by the interaction of the four variables, not by first-break type or residue policy alone.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Addiction recovery, therapy, education, and burnout recovery.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Programs for high-shame, addicted, or burned-out cohorts should fail more often when they demand self-owned agency after agency has been discredited, and should do better when initial support is located in sponsor, group, ritual, environment, medication, scaffold, or grace-like trust while later verification gradually returns appropriate responsibility.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Entry grammar becomes the way a person is allowed to begin change before they feel changed. Residue authorization becomes what capacity or support remains trustworthy after self-critique. Circularity severity becomes how much the cure presupposes the cured capacity. Source layer becomes the difference between program doctrine, facilitator practice, participant report, and later theory.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Outcomes and repair patterns are explained by alliance quality, socioeconomic support, diagnosis, program intensity, medication, facilitator skill, or peer support, with no incremental predictive value from entry-residue coding.

exact_claim: Transformative traditions organize the beginning of practice through an interaction between what remains authorized after critique and how entry into transformation is narrated, enacted, or discovered. Residue authorization constrains coherent entry grammars, entry events can disclose what the tradition later names as usable remainder, and downstream safeguards, warnings, effort theories, and verification forms should be predicted by four linked variables: residue authorization, entry grammar, circularity severity, and source layer.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Vow-held or grace-held entries should warn against self-credit and effort appropriation. No-self entries should warn against nihilism, dissociation, or reification. Self-inquiry entries should warn against objectifying the witness. Practice-realization entries should warn against instrumentalizing practice.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: If entry-residue interaction is real, split-source coding of entry texts and residue doctrine should predict later warning clusters better than entry grammar or residue policy alone.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Blind-coded corpus with entry passages, separate residue passages, and held-out manuals or practitioner interviews.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Warnings are predicted equally well by generic tradition identity, teacher style, Pargament agency style, Rambo conversion stage, VCE factors, or social ecology, with no incremental gain from the interaction term.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Teacher-encounter traditions that authorize hidden Self, no-self release, direct recognition, or grace should verify and repair different failures even when the visible entry event looks similar.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Traditions with similar entry forms but different residue policies should develop different verification and repair rules.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Paired comparison of Advaita self-inquiry, Dzogchen or Mahamudra pointing-out, Zen encounter, and Christian spiritual direction.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Similar teacher-encounter forms produce the same warning and repair profile regardless of residue authorization.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Two traditions that both authorize non-acquired reality should differ if one begins through vow or grace, another through direct recognition, and another through continuous practice-realization.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Traditions with similar residue authorization but different entry grammar should produce different beginner safeguards.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Within-family and cross-family comparisons: Pure Land, Christian grace, Soto Zen, Dzogchen, and Advaita.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Safeguards track only residue authorization or only social institution, not entry grammar.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: High-circularity paths should rely more on vow, grace, teacher authorization, ritual threshold, paradox pedagogy, community holding, or no-threshold practice-realization.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Circularity severity should predict auxiliary support structures.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Pre-registered coding across at least eight traditions, with inter-rater reliability.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Circularity severity does not correlate with auxiliary supports once social ecology and institutional inheritance are controlled.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Later systematization should smooth circularity and harmonize residue tensions more than ritual instructions, practitioner reports, or early canonical texts.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Source layer should change the coding outcome.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Same-tradition corpora split by canonical text, initiation or entry text, manual, practitioner report, and later commentary.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Canonical, ritual, practitioner, pedagogical, and later doctrinal layers produce the same codes and the same prediction accuracy.

literature_search_queries: "religious conversion" Rambo context crisis quest encounter interaction commitment consequences
"doctrine as grammar" Lindbeck cultural linguistic religion
"religion problem solving process" Pargament self-directing deferring collaborative
"rites of passage" separation transition reincorporation Van Gennep Turner
"Tannisho" Other Power self-power Primal Vow chapter 11
"Anattalakkhana Sutta" not self release knowledge of release
"Varieties of Contemplative Experience" worldview teacher practice factors

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate binds entry and residue into one four-variable interaction model.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Very high internal reduction. Treat as consolidation and extension, not a new discovery.
near_neighbors.overlap: Extremely close. These already separate beginning grammar, residue policy, support locus, claimant rules, circularity, source layer, safeguards, warnings, and split-source prediction.
near_neighbors.source: Prior Lumenary records: First-Break Problem, Residue Policy in Negative Self-Practice, Entry-State Ledger, Entry-Claimant Grammar, Threshold Grammar Under Translation Strain, Layered Authorization of Beginning, Operational Remainder Ecology, local project records in reviews/originality/

near_neighbors.difference: Rambo does not pair entry process with post-negation residue authorization or test prediction of contemplative warnings from that interaction.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for the entry side. The candidate must beat conversion-process baselines.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for entry architecture. Rambo treats conversion as multifaceted change with personal, cultural, social, and religious implications, including new options, crisis, encounter, learning roles, rituals, rhetoric, commitment, and consequences.
near_neighbors.source: Lewis Rambo, Understanding Religious Conversion, Yale University Press, https://yalebooks.yale.edu/book/9780300065152/understanding-religious-conversion/

near_neighbors.difference: Rites-of-passage theory does not focus on what remains authorized after self-critique, no-self, grace, vow, or practice-realization.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for threshold and beginning language, with some remaining novelty for residue interaction.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for threshold structure, separation, transition, reincorporation, ritual holding, danger, and change in religious or social status.
near_neighbors.source: Arnold van Gennep and Victor Turner on rites of passage and liminality, overview at https://www.britannica.com/topic/rite-of-passage

near_neighbors.difference: Lindbeck does not build an entry-residue coding sheet with held-out predictions for warnings and repairs.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for the grammar concept. Remaining contribution is operational and predictive.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for treating doctrine as a rule-like grammar that shapes religious speech, practice, identity, and coherent participation.
near_neighbors.source: George Lindbeck, doctrine as grammar and cultural-linguistic theory, summarized at https://people.bu.edu/wwildman/bce/mwt_themes_862_lindbeck.htm and https://www.commonwealmagazine.org/church-postliberal-age

near_neighbors.difference: Pargament studies religious coping, not entry into transformative practice after self-negation, nor source-layer coding of residue.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for support-locus and effort-theory claims.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for distributing agency between person and God through self-directing, deferring, and collaborative styles, and for predicting different outcomes from that distribution.
near_neighbors.source: Kenneth Pargament et al., Religion and the Problem-Solving Process: Three Styles of Coping, https://icmglt.org/icmlibrary/religion-and-the-problem-solving-process-three-styles-of-coping/

near_neighbors.difference: Tannisho is one tradition-internal case, not a cross-tradition predictive rubric.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Very high reduction for Pure Land examples and strong pressure against recoding Other Power as practitioner capacity.
near_neighbors.overlap: Near exact for vow-held entry, blocked self-credit, warning against self-power, and transformation disclosed through entrusting.
near_neighbors.source: Shinran and Tannisho Other Power sources, https://www.bdk.or.jp/document/dgtl-dl/dBET_Tannisho-Ofumi_1996.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate can include this as no-threshold or practice-realization, but Dogen is not easily treated as entry plus later residue.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High anomaly pressure. The model needs analyst-frame-refused and no-break values.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close anomaly. Practice and realization are one, beginner practice is already implicated in realization, and instrumental entry-to-fruit sequencing is rejected.

near_neighbors.difference: Situated learning does not encode grace, vow, no-self, witness, or soteriological residue authorization.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate to high reduction for distributed entry and source ecology.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for entry as distributed participation through community, roles, discourse, identity, artifacts, and movement from peripheral to fuller participation.
near_neighbors.source: Lave and Wenger, Situated Learning: Legitimate Peripheral Participation, https://www.cambridge.org/highereducation/books/situated-learning/6915ABD21C8E4619F750A4D4ACA616CD/legitimate-peripheral-participation-in-communities-of-practice/B27B920BABACE5EF83276572EA0EF2C7

near_neighbors.difference: VCE is broader and empirical-clinical; it does not propose entry grammar plus residue authorization as textual predictors.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High methodological reduction. Any empirical test must compare against VCE-style factor coding.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for separating practice factors, practitioner factors, worldview, teacher influence, community, interpretation, management strategy, and adverse effects.
near_neighbors.source: Lindahl et al., The Varieties of Contemplative Experience, https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239

near_neighbors.difference: Orange is one Christian doctrinal solution, not a general entry-residue model.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Very high reduction for grace-held entry and circularity claims.
near_neighbors.overlap: Near exact for the grace version of the first-break problem: prayer, desire, assent, and beginning of faith are attributed to grace rather than unaided nature.
near_neighbors.source: Second Council of Orange, canons 3 to 7, https://www.crivoice.org/creedorange.html

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as doctrine. Treat as a comparative and practitioner-facing research heuristic.

Merge or cross-index with First-Break Problem, Residue Policy in Negative Self-Practice, Entry-State Ledger, Entry-Claimant Grammar, Threshold Grammar Under Translation Strain, Claimability and Support Rubric, Layered Authorization of Beginning, and Operational Remainder Ecology unless separability testing proves independent value.

Build a pre-registered coding sheet with fields for residue authorization, entry grammar, circularity severity, source layer, support holder, forbidden claimant, safeguard, warning, verification, repair, evidence passage, analyst-frame refusal, and confidence.

Use split-source blind coding: code entry from entry texts or rituals, code residue from separate doctrinal passages, then predict safeguards and warnings from held-out manuals or practitioner interviews.

Add mandatory values for no-threshold, no-break, inherited practice, gradual socialization, vow-held entry, grace-held entry, teacher-recognition, practice-realization, radical Other Power, ritual-first entry, no-custody-frame, analyst-frame-refused, and undecidable.

Compare predictive power against Rambo conversion stages, Lofland-Stark conversion conditions, Van Gennep and Turner liminality, Lindbeck doctrine-as-grammar, Pargament agency styles, Lave and Wenger situated learning, upaya, religious socialization, VCE factor coding, and prior Lumenary ledgers.
Require inter-rater reliability before using the rubric publicly.
Ask practitioners for concrete failed-beginning cases and repair instructions, not agreement with the model.

Do not raise above extended unless the interaction term predicts held-out warnings, safeguards, verification, or repairs better than entry-only, residue-only, agency-style, social-ecology, clinical-risk, and tradition-identity baselines.
novelty_adjustment: Reduce novelty from 0.82 to about 0.53. The synthesis is useful and testable, but most components have strong near-neighbors: conversion theory for entry process, rites-of-passage theory for thresholds, Lindbeck for grammar, Pargament for agency distribution, Shinran and Orange for vow or grace-held beginnings, Dogen for practice-realization collapse, VCE for factor-separated contemplative outcomes, and prior Lumenary audits for residue, first-break, entry-state, threshold grammar, claimability, support, and operational remainder ecology. The remaining contribution is a split-source interaction test with additive predictive burden.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say the framework is obvious as self-power versus Other Power, grace versus works, upaya, conversion stages, or doctrine-as-grammar, and it would not alter sequencing, warning, verification, or repair. They cannot identify cases where the interaction predicts more than teacher experience, tradition identity, social context, or clinical risk.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners provide concrete cases where entry grammar alone and residue policy alone mispredict the failure, while the interaction predicts the actual warning or repair. They also confirm that source-layer separation prevents common comparative errors.
questions: Is this more than conversion theory, upaya, agency attribution, doctrine-as-grammar, or ordinary lineage pedagogy in new language?
Can you name a concrete failed-beginning case where repair depended on both the entry grammar and what the path allowed to remain after critique?
Would this rubric change how you sequence instruction, warn students, or verify progress?
Which cases in your tradition refuse the analyst's question of entry, residue, or claimant?
Can you predict a warning or repair from an entry text and a residue text before reading the warning section of the manual?
relevant_practitioners: Christian spiritual directors familiar with grace and apophasis
Sufi teachers familiar with bayah, fana, and baqa
Clinicians familiar with contemplative adverse effects

primary_pair: Dogen Bendowa and shusho itto, Soto Zen source, https://global.sotozen-net.or.jp/eng/library/key_terms/pdf/key_terms07.pdf
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model can become self-confirming if entry grammar, residue authorization, warning, and verification are coded from the same passage. It can also distort traditions that reject agency accounting by forcing them into an analyst's support and remainder vocabulary.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: This audit checked accessible primary translations, local prior Lumenary audits, and open sources on conversion, rites of passage, doctrine-as-grammar, religious coping, situated learning, Pure Land Other Power, Christian grace, and practice-realization. It did not fully review Rambo's full monograph, Lindbeck's full book, Japanese, Pali, Sanskrit, Tibetan, Latin, or Chinese originals, Shinran scholarship, Dogen scholarship, Sufi bayah and fana sources, Dzogchen pointing-out manuals, or practitioner interviews.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The primary texts support an interaction field but also reduce originality. Tannisho makes entry depend on entrusting to Amida's vow, relocates decisive efficacy to Other Power, and warns against self-power, teacher ownership, and self-will. SN 22.59 negates ownership of the five aggregates and moves through disenchantment, release, and knowledge of release, without authorizing a hidden self as remainder. Dogen strains the sequence because practice and realization are one, so beginning and fruit cannot be cleanly separated. The Gita complicates the model by mixing action, multiple causes, divine inner rulership, and final surrender, so one text may contain several entry-residue logics by chapter and voice.

title: Entry-Residue Architecture
unlike_statement: Unlike Rambo, Van Gennep, Turner, Lindbeck, Pargament, Lave and Wenger, VCE, Shinran, Dogen, Orange, and prior Lumenary ledgers, this idea says the key test is additive prediction: independently coded residue authorization and entry grammar should interact to predict held-out safeguards, warnings, effort theories, verification rules, and repairs better than entry-only, residue-only, agency-style, social-ecology, tradition-identity, or source-layer baselines.
